name: rldyour-security
description: Безопасная реализация и defensive review. EN: OWASP and security review skills.

interface.longDescription: Безопасность Codex для OWASP guidance, secrets, auth/authz и defensive review. EN: This skills-only plugin adds automatic non-blocking security guidance for Codex. Its skills should be selected automatically when the owner asks about security, secure implementation, OWASP, vulnerabilities, auth/authz, secrets, injection, dependency risk, security review, or $ry-sec-review. owasp-top-10-implementation keeps implementation work aligned with OWASP Top 10 2025, ASVS 5.0.0, and secure coding checklist principles without stopping normal development. ry-sec-review performs a defensive, hypothesis-driven security review inspired by Mythos-style application security review: recon, hypothesis generation, source-to-sink tracing, exploitability assessment, confidence ranking, remediation, and verification. The plugin does not configure MCP servers, does not add hooks, and does not block execution except where normal Codex safety rules apply to explicit destructive or malicious requests.
defaultPrompt: Используй $owasp-top-10-implementation: security guidance. EN: OWASP guidance.
Используй $ry-sec-review: проверь security risks. EN: security review.
Используй $ry-sec-review: аудит diff на уязвимости. EN: vulnerability review.
